channel.title: Better Late Than Never
channel.description: Recent content on Better Late Than Never

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Hi, I’m Jae. I’m working as TD at Sony pictures imageworks Vancouver. My resposibilities spans helping lighting and compositing teams by making tools, debugging and troubleshooting issues and optimizing renders and workflows.

item.title: Typography
item.description: Lid est laborum et dolorum fuga. Et harum quidem rerum facilis est et expeditasi distinctio. Nam libero tempore, cum soluta nobis est eligendi optio cumque nihilse impedit quo minus id quod amets untra dolor amet sad.
